title: clerodendrum filipes
intro: Clerodendrum filipes, also known as the 'Tassel Flower', is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum filipes can be found in teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to treat a range of ailments.
